mapper.select: SELECT cd_user AS CD_USER , cd_hansya AS CD_HANSYA , cd_kaisya AS CD_KAISYA , cd_hanbaitn AS CD_HANBAITN , cd_tenpo AS CD_TENPO , cd_syain AS CD_SYAIN , mj_name AS MJ_NAME , mj_role AS MJ_ROLE , kb_access_honten AS KB_ACCESS_HONTEN , kb_access_hansya AS KB_ACCESS_HANSYA , kb_access_yoyaku AS KB_ACCESS_YOYAKU , kb_hansya_mente AS KB_HANSYA_MENTE , kb_user_mente AS KB_USER_MENTE , kb_notice_mente AS KB_NOTICE_MENTE , kb_view_kpi AS KB_VIEW_KPI , kb_view_proc AS KB_VIEW_PROC , kb_view_ucar AS KB_VIEW_UCAR FROM ${uslimDb}.DM_USERINFO_AUTH WHERE cd_user = #{cdUser} LIMIT 1
SELECT cd_chiiki AS CD_CHIIKI , mj_chiiki AS MJ_CHIIKI FROM ${uslimDb}.DM_AREAMASTER

SELECT cd_hansya AS CD_HANSYA , cd_kaisya AS CD_KAISYA , cd_hanbaitn AS CD_HANBAITN , kj_hansya AS KJ_HANSYA , cd_chiiki AS CD_CHIIKI , mj_upassuse AS MJ_UPASSUSE , kb_disp AS KB_DISP FROM ${uslimDb}.DM_HANSYA_DISPLAY
SELECT cd_hanbaitn AS CD_HANBAITN , kb_dbcp AS KB_DBCP , mj_dlguid AS MJ_DLGUID FROM ${uslimDb}.DM_HANSYAINFO_POOL
